heading: Upper Duck Creek vs Upper Duroby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Duck Creek, New South Wales and Upper Duroby, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Duck Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Upper Duroby (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Duck Creek or Upper Duroby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Duck Creek has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Upper Duroby scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Duck Creek scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Duroby scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Duck Creek or Upper Duroby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Duck Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
